message:
refactor(storage): route saved search update/delete through cx entry

Extends the ft-xbnl0.2.3 cx-first migration to the three remaining saved
search writer shims: under `asupersync-runtime`, `update_saved_search_run`,
`update_saved_search_schedule`, and `delete_saved_search` now delegate to
their `_with_cx` siblings so each write passes through `send_with_cx` and
honors `cx.checkpoint()`.
